stemHtml: Based on the sleep credit/debit model, sleeping for 1 hour leads to (1) _____ credit(s) and staying awake for 1 hour leads to (2) _____ debit(s). Fatigue symptoms will appear when the sleep debit is higher than (3) _____ credit(s). In case of significant sleep debt, an individual needs at least (4) _____ consecutive hours of sleep.
